safety_invariants: Rename in place only; never rm or move any maildir file OUT of its folder (Expunge Both = server deletion risk)
Confirm the stray via corroboration before the single rename; STOP if inconclusive
Create Near guarantees the de-UID'd local-only file is never uploaded (no server duplicate)
Fully reversible: record exact old->new rename mapping; revert by renaming back
No full .mbsyncstate/.uidvalidity reset; no Gmail web-side mutation
definition_of_done: mbsync gmail and mail-sync gmail exit 0
Both colliding messages still present in Gmail All Mail server-side
mail-sync-timer non-failed and aerc banner cleared
Duplicate-UID sweep clean across Gmail/Logos folders
Documented decision on the optional mail-sync.nix benign-duplicate guard
mutation_surface: modules/home/email/mail-sync.nix (only if Phase 6 guard is chosen)
non_goals: Deleting/expunging/moving any maildir file out of its folder
